_comment: Promotion/demotion thresholds for Qwen3-35B as primary dev agent.

eligibility_gates._comment: Pass/fail PRECONDITIONS a candidate must clear BEFORE the scored bench below. SSOT + rationale: config/local-model-requirements.md. Eligibility is structural (Tier 0 protocol/runtime, Tier 2 lifecycle); the scored 'promotion' block is performance. A model can ace benchmarks and still be ineligible.
eligibility_gates._enforcement: All tier0 + tier2 gates must be true (tier3 too) for a candidate to enter the scored bench. tier1 capability is measured BY the scored dimensions below, mapped to model_tier.py tiers (SMALL/MID/LARGE).

promotion._rationale: tool_use bar is highest (0.75) — wrong collection or destructive call causes silent prod failures. overall 0.72 = 28/39 points, above RAGAS avg 0.6. 2 consecutive runs prevents lucky-run promotion.

demotion._rationale: Floors are 17-18 pct-points below promotion thresholds to prevent score-boundary flapping.

regression_alert._rationale: Any dimension dropping >= 10 pct-points vs previous run triggers attention queue alert.
